## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GC-AI and GrowthX teams to discuss ongoing projects, content strategy, and technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team to gain access to GC-AI's CMS for content posting; Surbhi to share existing tutorial video](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Exploring CLE (Continuing Legal Education) content as a potential programmatic SEO opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Discussed challenges and strategies for keeping AI-related content up-to-date](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Addressing Google Search Console alerts post-domain change from getgc.ai to gc.ai](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)

## Topics

### CLE Content Strategy

  - [CLE requirements vary by state, not city; typically 25 hours every few years (e.g., California)](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [GC-AI currently accredited for 1.25 hours in California](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic SEO pages for each state's CLE requirements](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Idea: Interactive tool/widget for CLE information, starting with 5 pre-programmed states](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Challenge: Keeping content up-to-date as requirements change](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Solution ideas:](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - ["Last updated" notifications](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
      - [Automated database updates](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
      - [Regular manual checks (e.g., yearly)](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [Potential AI-assisted content comparison for updates](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

### GC-AI Platform Access

  - [Elvis set up an account; Ryan to assist with whitelisting process](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [14-day free trial available for full access](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Elvis to send admin email for organization setup](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

### Content Management System (CMS) Access

  - [Surbhi to share existing tutorial video from Alessandra](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [If needed, can book additional time for specific questions](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [GrowthX team needs access to CMS for content posting](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

### Google Search Console Alert

  - [Alert received after domain change to gc.ai](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Some search results still showing old getgc.ai domain](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Permanent redirects are set up and working](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [May resolve itself over time as Google re-crawls the site](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [GrowthX team to investigate further once given access to Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/cGaob9NCMEKjLe1NjLnsQtqzHxELmRUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
